verdict: Decided by 1.2 points and a kicker nobody wanted.
note: Highest score of the week. We will hear about it until Thursday.
alert_body: Ankle. Listed as day-to-day, which in this league means “start him and find out.” Sofa Kings have no viable backup.
trade_verdict: One of these teams is 4-0. One is named the Fumble Fam.
quote: I don’t need a running back. I need everyone else to be worse.
